overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a science fiction game showing a character walking along an elevated futuristic platform during a pink sunset. The clip transitions to a first-person space view showing the orbital station from above against a nebula backdrop.

segments.scene_description: The character walks along an elevated observation deck during a vibrant pink sunset. The scene features futuristic white architecture on the left, garden planters on the right, and numerous floating platforms visible in the distance against the colorful sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: spacecraft cockpit view of orbital station

events.description: fade to black and transition from third-person platform view to first-person space perspective

agents.ego_description: observing from a spacecraft cockpit, viewing the orbital station against the cosmic backdrop

entered.detail: massive rotating space station with illuminated windows and the name 'CRUSADER' visible on the central tower
colorful red and green nebula clouds filling the space background

segments.scene_description: The perspective shifts to a first-person view from a spacecraft, showing the massive orbital station floating against a backdrop of colorful nebula clouds. The station's illuminated structures and rotating rings are visible in the darkness of space.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous transition from a serene architectural promenade during a sunset into the vast expanse of deep space. It begins with a walk along an elevated observation deck, passing futuristic white architecture and garden planters under a vibrant pink sky filled with distant floating platforms. As the perspective shifts, the terrestrial horizon vanishes, pulling the camera away from the deck and into the void. The scene then expands to a first-person view from a spacecraft, revealing the massive orbital station with its illuminated structures and rotating rings. Finally, the station is framed against a backdrop of swirling, colorful nebula clouds in the darkness of space.
